zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarete von Kleve於1310年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可列福時，她的父親Dietrich IX. von Kleve19歲，母親Margareta von Geldern20歲。她於1332年3月15日與Adolf II. von der Mark結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1348年9月18日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福蓋爾德享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margarete von Kleve于1310年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可列福时，她的父亲Dietrich IX. von Kleve19岁，母亲Margareta von Geldern20岁。她于1332年3月15日与Adolf II. von der Mark结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1348年9月18日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福蓋爾德享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kleve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Kleve (earlier Cleve) in Lower Rhineland, Westphalia, or Schleswig-Holstein. The placename probably derives from an old topographic term cleve ‘swamp’. Compare Cleve .
German: variant of   Klever   2.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Kleiva, from Old Norse kleif, klif ‘cliff, rocky ascent with a road or path’.

variants.name: Klever
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt, Ulrike.
German and Dutch: habitational name for someone from Kleve in the Rhineland or Schleswig-Holstein (see   Kleve   1).

German: from Middle Low German klēver ‘clover, meadow’, also ‘resin, turpentine’, hence a metonymic occupational name either for a farmer who grew clover or for someone who collected resin and distilled turpentine. In the Alemannic area this was also a nickname for a bungler. Compare Cleaver and Clever .

variants.name: Kleven
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Berger, Hjalmer, Jalmer, Knute, Maren, Obert, Thor, Thorval.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads all over Norway named Kleven, from the definite singular form of   Kleve  . Compare   Cleven   and   Cleveland  .
Dutch and German: rare variant of   Cleven  .

variants.name: Cleve
meanings: English: variant of   Cliff  .
German: variant of   Kleve  .

nameMeanings.name: Margarete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Greek. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretha
meanings: from Greek. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margarethe
meanings: from Greek. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margarete von Kleve was born in 1310, in Kleve, Rhineland, Prussia, her father, Dietrich IX. von Kleve, was 19 and her mother, Margareta von Geldern, was 20. She married Adolf II. von der Mark on 15 March 1332. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 18 September 1348, in Geldern, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarete von Kleve est née en 1310, à Kleve, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Dietrich IX. von Kleve, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margareta von Geldern, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Adolf II. von der Mark le 15 mars 1332. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 septembre 1348, à Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margarete von Kleve 1310 in Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dietrich IX. von Kleve 19 und ihre Mutter Margareta von Geldern 20. Sie hat am 15. März 1332 Adolf II. von der Mark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. September 1348 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margarete von Kleve è nata il nel 1310 nel Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, sua padre, Dietrich IX. von Kleve, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Margareta von Geldern, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Adolf II. von der Mark il 15 marzo 1332. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 settembre 1348, nel Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margarete von Kleveが1310年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレブで生まれた時，父Dietrich IX. von Kleveは19歳，母Margareta von Geldernは20歳であった。1332年3月15日にAdolf II. von der Markと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1348年9月18日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブジェルデルンで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margarete von Kleve(이)가 1310년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 클브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dietrich IX. von Kleve(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margareta von Geldern(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1332년 3월 15일 Adolf II. von der Mark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1348년 9월 18일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 클브 글더에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margarete von Kleve nasceu em 1310, em Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Dietrich IX. von Kleve, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margareta von Geldern, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Adolf II. von der Mark em 15 de março de 1332. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1348, em Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarete von Kleve родилась в 1310 г. в местности клив, раинпровинз, Пруссия, её отцу по имени Dietrich IX. von Kleve было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margareta von Geldern, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adolf II. von der Mark 15 марта 1332 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 18 сентября 1348 г. в местности джелдирн, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margarete von Kleve nació en 1310, en Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, su papá, Dietrich IX. von Kleve, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margareta von Geldern, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Adolf II. von der Mark el 15 de marzo de 1332. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de septiembre de 1348, en Geldern, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 38 años.
